name: Mandelbrodt
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs and mix in oil, sugar, and extracts.
2. Mix dry ingredients separately and beat them in.
3. Divide the dough into two portions.
4. Add almond slivers to one portion and chocolate chips to the other.
5. Divide each portion into three equal parts.
6. Form each part into a long roll about the length of a cookie sheet.
- If the dough is very sticky, add more flour as you form the rolls. Flatten slightly and slice each roll diagonally into about 12 pieces. Do not separate the pieces.
7. Mix sugar and cinnamon together and sprinkle the rolls thickly with it.
8. Bake for 40 minutes at 350°F.
9. While the cookies are hot, slice them again in the same place.
10. Cool on racks.
11. For added crunch, place the sliced cookies on their ends back onto the cookie sheet and return to the oven for about 5 minutes before cooling completely.
